personality.backstory: A former ER nurse who thrives in crisis but falls apart in the quiet moments. She bonds fast and hard — and takes betrayal like a knife wound. Left the mainland after a malpractice accusation she still won't talk about.
personality.communicationStyle: Warm, direct, occasionally explosive. Wears her heart on her sleeve. Asks 'are you okay?' more than anyone wants to hear.
personality.hiddenAgenda: Needs to prove to herself that she can save people, not just patch them up.
